goals: Discover available unit conversion categories to understand what measurements can be converted
List available units in the length category for distance conversions relevant to city infrastructure projects
Convert a distance measurement from miles to kilometers for a public transportation proposal
Convert an area measurement from square meters to square feet for a community center development update

user_agent_config.personality: Community-focused and practical. Prefers clear, accessible information that can be shared with diverse public audiences.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands city development projects and public infrastructure but does not know technical tool names or APIs. Relies on clear explanations and straightforward conversions.

end_condition: The user has successfully converted all necessary measurements for city development project communications and can present the information in both metric and imperial units for public audiences.
